title: Cobblemon - Fat Pikachu and friends
description: adds fat Pikachu, surfing and balloon plus many more!
body:
# ⚡ Cobblemon – Fat Pikachu & Friends

Fat Pikachu & Friends adds a collection of unique Pikachu variants, each with their own stat spreads, typings, abilities, and fully animated models.

All forms have a base stat total of 540, with different stat spreads focusing on physical, special, or defensive roles.

---

<details>
<summary>🟡 How to Get Fat Pikachu</summary>

Feed **Pichu 25 sweets**:

- Strawberry Sweet  
- Love Sweet  
- Berry Sweet  
- Clover Sweet  
- Flower Sweet  
- Star Sweet  
- Ribbon Sweet  
- Whipped Cream  
- Sweet Apple  

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>🔄 How to Get Fat Pikachu Variants</summary>

Right-click Fat Pikachu with the following items:

- 🎈 **Air Balloon** → Balloon Pikachu *(learns Fly)*  
- 🐛 **Binding Band** → Bug Catcher Pikachu *(learns Bug Bite)*  
- ☠️ **Glass Bottle / Potion** → Chemist Pikachu *(learns Toxic)*  
- 🐉 **Dragon Fang** → Dragonite Pikachu *(learns Draco Meteor)*  
- 🥊 **Punching Glove** → Fighter Pikachu *(learns Close Combat)*  
- 🛡️ **Iron Chestplate** → Knight Pikachu *(learns Metal Claw)*  
- 🕴️ **Reaper Cloth** → Mafia Pikachu *(learns Fake Out)*  
- ⛏️ **Rocky Helmet** → Miner Pikachu *(learns Rock Slide)*  
- 🌙 **Fairy Gem** → Sailor Moon Pikachu *(learns Dazzling Gleam)*  
- ❄️ **Never-Melt Ice** → Snow Pikachu *(learns Blizzard)*  
- 🌊 **Water Bucket** → Surfing Pikachu *(learns Surf)*  
- 🔥 **Lava Bucket** → Zuko Pikachu *(learns Flamethrower)*  
- ⚡ **Twisted Spoon** → Mob Pikachu *(learns Psychic)*  
- 🌀 **Psychic Gem** → Gojo Pikachu *(learns Psychic)*  

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>📊 Base Stats (All Forms – 540 BST)</summary>

**🟡 FAT (fatchu)**  
HP 95 / Atk 70 / Def 90 / SpA 115 / SpD 95 / Spe 75  

**🎈 BALLOON**  
HP 70 / Atk 60 / Def 65 / SpA 105 / SpD 90 / Spe 150  

**🐛 BUG**  
HP 80 / Atk 95 / Def 80 / SpA 95 / SpD 80 / Spe 110  

**🐉 DRAGONITE COSTUME**  
HP 90 / Atk 110 / Def 85 / SpA 110 / SpD 85 / Spe 60  

**🕴️ MAFIA**  
HP 75 / Atk 115 / Def 75 / SpA 95 / SpD 70 / Spe 110  

**🛡️ KNIGHT**  
HP 90 / Atk 110 / Def 120 / SpA 70 / SpD 100 / Spe 50  

**☠️ CHEMIST**  
HP 75 / Atk 60 / Def 80 / SpA 120 / SpD 95 / Spe 110  

**⛏️ MINER**  
HP 95 / Atk 120 / Def 100 / SpA 60 / SpD 85 / Spe 80  

**🌙 SAILOR MOON**  
HP 85 / Atk 60 / Def 80 / SpA 125 / SpD 105 / Spe 85  

**🌊 SURFING**  
HP 80 / Atk 85 / Def 75 / SpA 110 / SpD 80 / Spe 110  

**🥊 FIGHTER (LUFFY)**  
HP 90 / Atk 125 / Def 95 / SpA 60 / SpD 80 / Spe 90  

**❄️ SNOW**  
HP 80 / Atk 85 / Def 75 / SpA 110 / SpD 90 / Spe 100  

**🌀 GOJO**  
HP 85 / Atk 65 / Def 85 / SpA 135 / SpD 110 / Spe 60  

**⚡ MOB**  
HP 85 / Atk 60 / Def 80 / SpA 140 / SpD 95 / Spe 80  

**🔥 ZUKO**  
HP 85 / Atk 95 / Def 80 / SpA 115 / SpD 85 / Spe 80  

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>♻️ Reverting Forms</summary>

- Use a **Cleanse Tag** on any variant to revert back to **Fat Pikachu**

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>✈️ Special Features</summary>

- 🎈 **Balloon Pikachu is rideable and can fly**, carrying you

</details>

---

# 🧠 Abilities

<details>
<summary>✨ Custom Abilities and Hidden Abilities</summary>

## 🟡 FAT (fatchu)
- **Fatchu** – Boosts Electric moves, reduces damage taken, cannot gain Speed  

## 🎈 BALLOON
- **Floaty Balloons** – Floats above the ground (levitate), gaining Speed on entry. Contact moves may miss as it spins away 

## 🐛 BUG
- **Swarm Tactics** – Physical Bug moves gain priority, special may multi-hit  
- **Static Swarm** – Bug moves may paralyze  
- **Shock Infestation** – Bug-type moves may paralyze or slow the target. The Pokémon’s Bug-type moves are stronger against paralyzed foe  

## 🐉 DRAGONITE COSTUME
- **Thunder Scales** – When at full HP, the Pokémon takes only half damage from attacks. If it’s hit by a super-effective move, the attacker is hurt by recoil.  
- **Draconic Surge** – Dragon moves charge power for next Electric move  
- **Costume Wings** – Grants Ground immunity and boosts Speed  

## 🕴️ MAFIA
- **Concrete Shoes** – Traps and slows attackers on super-effective hits  
- **Intimidating Presence** – Lowers foe Attack & Speed on entry  

## 🛡️ KNIGHT
- **Whirling Blade** – Special moves hit 2–3 times with reduced power  
- **Executioner’s Edge** – Physical moves are stronger, and even more powerful against weakened targets  
- **Iron Resolve** – Cannot be stat-lowered, attacks ignores defensive boosts 

## ☠️ CHEMIST
- **Toxic Concoction** – Poison moves badly poison, Electric moves may also poison  
- **Volatile Mixture** – Electric and Poison-type moves may cause a variety of unpredictable additional effects
- **Corrosive Formula** – Electric and Poison-type moves are stronger, and even more powerful against poisoned targets 

## ⛏️ MINER
- **Ore Breaker** – Ignores defensive boosts  
- **Rock Miner** – Rock moves heal instead of damage  
- **Excavator** – Electric-type moves can hit Ground-type Pokémon and deal extra damage to Rock- and Ground-types 

## 🌙 SAILOR MOON
- **Moon Princess** – On entry, cures the team's status conditions, clears hazards, boosts its power, and restores HP each turn

## 🌊 SURFING
- **Surf Master** – Boosts Water-type moves. Wave-based moves build momentum, increasing Speed, and may paralyze foes.  

## 🥊 FIGHTER (LUFFY)
- **Rubber Charge** – Reduces damage from physical attacks. Contact may paralyze attackers, and its fighting spirit grows stronger under pressure 

## ❄️ SNOW
- **Snow Drift** – Boosts Ice-type moves. Using them builds Speed and may cause foes to slip and lose Speed

## 🌀 GOJO
- **Infinity** – Immune to all damaging moves except slicing moves  

## ⚡ MOB
- **100%** – Builds emotional energy when hit. Upon reaching 100%, sharply boosts Special Attack and Speed 

## 🔥 ZUKO
- **Inner Fire** – Gains SpA when damaged, Fire moves stronger at low HP  
- **Lightning Bender** – Absorbs Electric moves, boosts Speed and restores hp  

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>📦 Installation</summary>

**Singleplayer:**  
  - Place the `.zip` file into `/saves/[WORLDNAME]/datapacks`  
  - Place the `.zip` into `/resourcepacks`  
  - Enable in-game via `ESC → Options → Resource Packs`

  **Servers:**  
  - Place the `.zip` into `/world/datapacks`  
  - (Folder name may differ — e.g., `myworld` or custom)  
  - If unsure, consult your host’s guide on adding datapacks.

  **Every Player** must also have the `.zip` installed as a **Resource Pack**.  
  - Best practice: each player installs it manually.  
  - You *can* use a server resource pack, but Cobblemon add-ons can be finicky with that.

</details>
